prompt_replacements.old: List all completed in-person sale records from March 2026.
prompt_replacements.new: List all sales from March 2026, including deleted sales.

prompt_replacements.old:
After writing answer_population, inspect each EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT. When the question supplies a concrete value used by that test, declare the smallest copied value phrase as one predicate_value and reference that input from the test. Do not turn the answer subject or counted unit into an input.
A predicate_value does not identify one particular resource.
prompt_replacements.new:
A predicate_value states a requirement every qualifying candidate must satisfy. Copy the smallest phrase that supplies that required value and reference it from the matching EXPLICIT_USER_CONSTRAINT.
A permission that broadens which candidates may be included is not a predicate_value and creates no question input or membership test.
